title: eragrostis major
intro: Eragrostis major, also known as Taungia grass or tufted love grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Eragrostis major include reducing inflammation, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis major can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
